seoTitle: Ferney vs Ferny Glen — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ferney and Ferny Glen. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ferney vs Ferny Glen: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ferney and Ferny Glen.
heading: Ferney vs Ferny Glen — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ferney, Queensland and Ferny Glen, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ferny Glen has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Ferney (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ferney or Ferny Glen safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ferney has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Ferny Glen scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ferney scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Ferny Glen scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ferney or Ferny Glen?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ferny Glen has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
